reviews.title: Traumatic wait for young kids for long check in process
reviews.text:
Front desk couldn’t find my booking despite giving them agoda confirmation sheet. Despite booking for family room with twin beds we were given a single bed and ordinary room. 

This is not the reputation of Westin we expected. Fundamentally the hotel and room conditions not up expectation.
reviews.response:
Dear guest, thanks for you enjoyed your recent stay with us. We feel sorry that our service could not won your high praise. We will forward this comment to our relevant department. Meanwhile, we are Strengthen employee-to-guest service training in order to provide guests a better accommodation. 

I hope this incident did not mar you overall impression of The Westin Fuzhou Minjiang and that you will afford us an opportunity of welcoming you back soon.

reviews.title: Clean ,next to big shopping mall: wan tat shopping
reviews.text: This is the second time I stayed in this hotel. It is next to Wan Tat Shopping centre. Also it is near to airport.
reviews.positives: Clean. Next to shopping centre, near airport

reviews.title: clean hotel next to a Hugh shopping centre .
reviews.text: A good hotel which I will liked to recommend to my friends. But will recommend the hotel to improve its room service Manu . More Asian foods should be provided.
reviews.positives: Clean, next to shopping centre, good value for money.

reviews.title: Swift stay
reviews.text: Alright hotel, maybe will stay again.
reviews.positives: Great food, nice room condition, friendly staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Because the equipment is old, there were some broken parts.

reviews.title: Not good enough but worth to stay
reviews.text: Overall is good, nice room, close to a shopping mall.  Just some equipment is quite old, not enough to call a five stars hotel, but still, with this price, it is a good choice to stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good hoyel

reviews.title: excellent service, clean and convenient
reviews.text: Nice stay, next to mall, direct bus service from airport is very good.
reviews.positives: bus service from airport to hotel directly, excellent service and clean

reviews.title: good stay convienent
reviews.text: lovely hotel
reviews.positives: clean

reviews.title: The hotel cleanliness and breakfast is super
reviews.text: I am fully satisfied with the hotel. The staff are friendly and responsive. The breakfast is super without question with variety of choices. I will definitely stay in this hotel again in future. Hotel location is perfect attached with shopping malls. The food court at this shopping is excellent  with many choices. The only  problem I faced is communication with english. Most people here are not english speaking but the hotel staff are english speaker which is great.
reviews.positives: Location, clean, hotel staff is great

reviews.title: Very Pleasant Hotel with 5 Star service
reviews.text: Very pleasant Stay with a good selection of restaurants and shopping malls. Rooms were clean and big with good view. The only flaw was that this hotel isn't located near the main attraction of Fuzhou but taxis plentiful.
reviews.positives: Big Rooms, Great View and exceptional Staff Performance

reviews.title: satisfaction
reviews.text: Pleasant, looking forward to visit my relative again come this coming CNY
reviews.positives: Large Room, clean room and very quiet with good security

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
It is new, well decorated, stylish, but a few resturants inside and they are small.
I have not try the resturants as they are not look good. But the shopping centre is so close to hotel and have many good choices. Beauitful river view and quite environment. Basically, it is nice and will book again.
reviews.positives: new and big room, good location, close to shopping centre and resturants

reviews.title: Only Chinese TV Channels in the rooms
reviews.text: This Hotel is very nice but if you want to watch some foreign TV channels you cant as they are all off which is a bit disappointing when this is a five star Hotel.

reviews.title: Quite place to stay
reviews.text: Beside mall & beer house to cap up the night

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great hotel, only wish there were more staff that understood English. Very comfortable hotel rooms. Wanda plaza nextdoor is not fantastic and doesn’t have many western stores. I would stay here again.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel in a good location
reviews.text: Rooms are very nice, comfy beds. Food was great (thanks to Garry, great service!) Staff are very helpful. Swimming pool is a bit dull, jacuzzi was nice until everyone started spitting in it. Same with the pool unfortunately. You have to wear a swimming cap but it seems ok to spit everywhere. Strange. Good gym. Location was also good.

reviews.title: comfort and clean
reviews.positives: comfortable ，clean， city centre

reviews.title: Fabulous room. Nice complimentary teabags
reviews.text: It was a great hotel. The bed was very comfortable. The view from the high floor was great!
reviews.positives: Near to airport. Next to a shopping centre. Great new hotel..

reviews.title: Customer service was great, Especially for front desk and lobby, Room service was excellent too.
reviews.positives: Convenient location for shopping eating and visiting.

reviews.title: small details adding up
reviews.text:
LANGUAGE: most of the staff has difficulties understanding English. after being overcharged by mistake by a female clerk, a male clerk apologized and offered me fruit to my room. that was ok BUT until I wait for the fruit 45 minutes. then i had to go out, he forgot to send the fruit, then the fruit came when it was no longer needed.
SHOWER :the shampoo and hair conditioner are very low quality leaving my hair dry and looking like I did not use hair conditioner at all, even i applied a lot.
BREAKFAST:  Most of it was ok, but the cheese doesnt have a cover so all the cheese looks dried as it is exposed, most of the pastries were hard and dry.  very diffucult to spread honey and syrup, maybe on purposu to save honey.  juice isnt squeezed, coffee tasted very roasted and acidic.
the elevators closed the door on my face few times as the timing is too short, so when u see it and run to it the doors close on your face.
ALL SMALL DETAILS THAT WHEN ADDED UP CREATES A WHOLE FEELING OF NOT 5 STARS.
WALLS: accusting islolation is very poor, you easily hear other people's room activities. for example i head my neighbor singing in the shower, like he was singing inside my room, very loud and clear and the man wasnt actually screaming. just normal shower singing

reviews.title: Business trip
reviews.text: This hotel is good I have stay here a few times now and would recommend it.

reviews.title: comfortable stay in a nice room
reviews.text: The lockers are quite small in the fitness area and there are some elements of the overall design that leave a bit to be desired. Given that this is a 2nd tier city in China, the civility of most of the guests also leaves much to be desired. Otherwise this is a nice and comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: room size, friendly staff, convenient

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: El servicio de valet 140 dolares por 8 remeras. Estan locos

reviews.title: Air cond not cold
reviews.text: The air conditioning not cold until need to request for an additional portable air cooler. The hotel overall is good. However maybe the room is abit old, need for some improvement on their facilities in the room.
reviews.response: We are glad that you enjoyed your recent stay with us at the Westin Fuzhou Minjiang. It's our honor by your good commments.In respond to your feedback, we'll pay more attention to the facilities improvement in time in our restaurant. Actually, we value your comments and please accept our appreciation for your feedback.Please also believe that we will make targeted improvements. I hope that you would give us another opportunity to serve you once again in the near future.

reviews.title: nice stay
reviews.text: Great stay.
reviews.positives: comfort  bed and room, good location

reviews.title: New and nice hotel
reviews.text:
Very nice and comfort room.
So pity we don't try the breakfast.
I hope they can maintanance  the non smoking room just like now since it is quite hard to have a real non smoking room in most of the China's hotels.
reviews.positives: comfort room and bed, good location

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel, aber leider wurde meine Freude getrübt
reviews.positives:
Der Empfang im Hotel war sehr freundlich. Bei der Ankunft direkt abgenommen und später aufs Zimmer gebracht. Am Folgetag der Anreise hatte ich Geburtstag. Das Hotelpersonal hat eine leckere Torte auf das Zimmer gestellt. Es waren ein paar kleine Pappteller und Besteck dabei und auch ein paar Kerzen. Hab mich sehr gefreut.

Nachdem die Reklamation mit dem PC bearbeitet war, hat man uns einen Obstteller und drei Kuchen Pralinen auf das Zimmer gestellt. Es war gut gemeint, aber ich hätte lieber gleich ein sauberes WC im Zimmer gehabt. Es war so offensichtlich, dass man es einfach nicht übersehen kann und deswegen ist es auch nicht zu entschuldigen, einem Gast so ein WC anzubieten.
reviews.negatives: Wir sind um 16:30 Uhr angereist,.com sollten die Zimmer ab 16 Uhr zur Verfügung stehen. Leider waren die Zimmer (wir hatten drei gebucht nicht fertig.  Das Rezeptionspersonal hat um eben ein bisschen für ein Getränk im Hotel eigenen Kaffee angeboten. Auf dem Gutschein war ein Kaffee abgebildet. Sie hat nach einem Kaffee gefragt und wurde aber gesagt, dass der Gutschein nur für einen Fruchtsaft oder eine Limonade gültig ist. Für einen Kaffee müssten wir  zuzahlen. 😂.  Außerdem war die Toilette nicht vernünftig gereinigt. Ich hab es am Tag der Anreise auf sich beruhen lassen und mir am nächsten Tag nach erfolgter Reinigung noch mal angeschaut. Wieder nicht, den offensichtlichen Schmutz entfernt. (Alter UrinSchmodder). Hab das dann am nächsten Tag reklamiert. Die Reklamation wurde zügig bearbeitet und zu meiner Zufriedenheit erledigt. Ich war verärgert, weil ich mich an meinem Geburtstag beschweren musste. Klar hätte ich auch am Tag vorher machen können. Ich war aber davon ausgegangen, dass es nur ein Versehen war, nicht vernünftig zu reinigen. Am nächsten Tag hat sich leider bestätigt, dass die Reinigung immer nur ungenügend erfolgt. Der Zustand des PCs entsprach einem mangelhaft. Eklig, wenn man eine urinverschmierten Toilette im Zimmer hat.

reviews.title: One of the good hotel that I had stayed
reviews.text: I was one of the good hotel that I had stayed in. I will go back again to stay there if I am going back to Fuzhou. wanda shopping centre was just beside the hotel and that make shopping easy.  It was easy to get around there too as the hotel is centralize and with taxi it was easy to go anywhere.
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly and they are quick to respond to my request  The breakfast there was fantastic and wide spread of choice.  The room was huge and clean, i just love it!

reviews.title: spacious and comfort room
reviews.positives: modern and luxury degsig, comfort bed. breakfast buffet provides many choices and the food is delicious.

reviews.title: Clean and close to shopping mall
reviews.text:
Room : super clean, spacy, the bed type is firm (i would love to have medium).

The plug is international type, my charger doesnt need additional extension. This is why i always book international chain hotel !!

But unfortunately, all the receptionists and room service cant speak english, even a little (other reason i book intl chain hotel is also i dnt wanna have language barrier). I asked simple questions, and ended up with google translate. 🥲 like come on Westin..

reviews.title: Good Value, Clean and Good Service
reviews.text: As a First time traveler to Fuzhou, The Westin Fuzhou definitely gave me a good impression of the city. Quiet at night, have a Starbucks next door, with a shopping mall in walkable distance, very convenient.

reviews.title: very nice hotel with caring staff.
reviews.text: Everything was fine, only the locals who stayed in the hotel can't understand the meaning of "no smoking".
reviews.positives: the room, the staff, the scent.

reviews.title: Great Hotel
reviews.text: I stayed for one night due to a flight transit in Fuzhou. The bed was very comfortable, and we had a pleasant stay with a great rest. The front office staff on duty on 3 January 2026 were excellent and assisted me a lot in arranging the airport transfer. They were all very helpful and generous.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good location, convenient to everywhere. Big room. Nice Service.

reviews.title: Family Visit
reviews.text: Excellent location, cleanliness and exceptional friendly staff. Recommended with children.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Had a good view of the river. nice mall just beside the hotel.

reviews.title: Great hotel and team.
reviews.text:
Can’t fault the room, hotel, or team... except that the buffet dinner was a little too ordinary. Was a very slow evening. Almost better to have just had A La Cart. 
The buffet breakfast was better than average, but certainly not spectacular.
reviews.response: We are glad that you enjoyed your recent stay with us at the Westin Fuzhou Minjiang. It's our honor by your good commments.In respond to your feedback, we'll pay more attention to the food supply in our restaurant. Actually, we value your comments and please accept our appreciation for your feedback.Please also believe that we will make targeted improvements. I hope that you would give us another opportunity to serve you once again in the near future.

reviews.title: Everything superb
reviews.text: The only thing not all staff can speak English. Breakfast is great, everything ok

reviews.title: still comparatively good
reviews.text: Preis-Leistung stimmt, Zimmer ist sauber und das Frühstücksbuffet bietet  gute Auswahl.  Der Service hat jedoch im Vergleich zu früheren Aufenthalten (vor Covid-Corona) etwas nachgelassen, z.B. gestaltete sich die Kommunikation an der Rezeption mangels ausreichender Zahl englisch-sprechendem Personals  teilweise schwierig; auch war die Internetverbindung zeitweise schwach.  Miles&More ist nicht bekannt, obwohl die Marriott Bonvoy Gruppe dort gelistet ist.

reviews.title: 在福州很好的住宿洒店，符合期待
reviews.positives: 空間大，整體乾淨明亮，沒有煙味

reviews.title: Westin Hotelとして期待通り
reviews.text:
Westin Hotel としての基準というか、5スターホテルとしてのサービス、部屋の清潔さ、良い雰囲気がありました。
次回Fuzhouに来る際も利用したいと思います。
reviews.positives: １．部屋が快適　　２．ホテルの雰囲気が良い　　３.  Westinとしての期待通りのホテル

reviews.title: 物品提供不太周到
reviews.text:
首先十分欣賞酒店會預先詢問到酒店時間以作安排，但房間的準備不太足夠，因為我是三個成人入住一間房，可是供應的物品，除了毛巾，其他都只是供二人使用，要打電話給前台要求補上。
除此之外，前台及清潔的服務員態度都很親切，bell boy也十分幫忙有禮。

reviews.title: 還好
reviews.text: 環境不錯，位置偏了一點，但總體而言還好！泳沲需要泳帽，如果想游泳就要自備了，那裡買比較貴，如果有濕蒸就更好

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 地理位置好
reviews.negatives: 装修老旧，厕所没有换风扇，淋浴间一股潮湿的霉味，卫生打扫一般，地毯老旧污泽斑斑的，连胶囊咖啡都没有，感觉除了旁边餐饮方便，其他没有吸引回住的点

reviews.title: 舒適豪華價錢合理
reviews.text: 大堂有氣魄,地方整潔,設備齊全,房间寬敞舒適,房間浴室設計時尚,用品精美齊全.大床舒服讓人有完全休息的體驗.
reviews.positives: 接待員友善笑容好,酒店內職員能提供有用協助,服務人員禮貌良好.

reviews.title: 卫置很好，大堂服务也好，清洁服务非常被动

reviews.title: 很棒的住宿
reviews.text: 謝謝劉超經理給予我們難忘的住宿體驗，飯店位置及便利性很棒，樓下就是萬達廣場，餐飲很方便，宇洋金融大廈也不遠，10分鐘就能走到，ㄧ樓的超市餐飲建議去吃吃，蠻不錯的，而且房間也整理乾淨，CP值很棒的酒店

reviews.title: 唯一的缺點就是讓我完全不想回家
reviews.text: 唯一的缺點就是讓我完全不想回家。所有的細節都無可挑剔的一家酒店。客房服務的餐點比早晚餐自助還要精緻。建議至少享受ㄧ次客房送餐服務，搭配江景房的夜景，絕對是享受。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient and beautiful hotel to rest for 2 days before proceeding to other China cities.  Front desk staffs are very courteous and helpful,they even help us to book online train tickets from here to Xiamen. The fruit basket sent to our room on the 2nd day of our stay was also  very heartwarming. The waterfront view from our room is superb. Will come back to this hotel again next time whenever we visit fuzhou again.
